events.name: TILE_CLICK
events.description: Emits UI:{tileClickEvent} with { x, y } on tile click (inert, clears selection only)

events.name: UNIT_CLICK
events.description: Emits UI:{unitClickEvent} with { unitId } on unit click (inert, clears selection only)

events.name: MOVE_LEFT
events.description: Steer left one cell (keyboard keyMap or d-pad)

events.name: MOVE_RIGHT
events.description: Steer right one cell (keyboard keyMap or d-pad)

events.name: MOVE_UP
events.description: Steer up one cell and accelerate (speed+1, cap 3)

events.name: MOVE_DOWN
events.description: Steer down one cell and brake (speed-1, floor 0)

events.name: GAME_END
events.description: Emitted when a car finishes totalLaps (victory) or the rival does (defeat)

events.name: PLAY_AGAIN
events.description: Resets the race to the start line

overridableConfigKeys.label: Checkpoints
overridableConfigKeys.description: Ordered N/E/S/W checkpoints a car must cross before the finish counts as a lap

overridableConfigKeys.label: Start Line
overridableConfigKeys.description: Start/finish cell; crossing it with all checkpoints hit increments lap

overridableConfigKeys.label: Total Laps
overridableConfigKeys.description: Number of laps to complete to win

overridableConfigKeys.label: Units
overridableConfigKeys.description: Player and rival cars on the track
